title: Youtube Poop: The Legend of WalrusGuy
description:
((Edit: Right...

I'm going to say that out of all my Poops, including my first four CD-i ones, THIS is the worst one out of all of them.  Yes, that's right, even worse than "Teh Lazer Collection".  Why?  Because I spent absolutely NO time on this.  I patched it together in twenty minutes and just hoped that you could make everything out.

That is not what I believe in doing.  I don't even think this should've been MADE.  I'm only keeping it up because it's my history.

Oh, and if you haven't figured it out by now, I'm not really WalrusGuy.  Though you already knew that, right?))

I didn't spend much time on this, as you can see.  The sentence mixing might be a bit hard to make out because of that.  I just wanted to make something on account of recent events, assuming everyone's heard the bad news.  Hopefully, this will cheer you up.  Maybe if I'm lucky, Bristol-Myers won't file any copyright claims for this.  Enjoy! :)


((Note: I'm not losing my touch, if that's what you're thinking.  Click this link if you don't believe me. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JQQpjXqVr9M ))
